targets.materialStory: friendly translucent slime body with soft magical jelly volume
targets.accentRule: one readable blue-purple arcane highlight; avoid noisy internal detail
visualRules: Must read as friendly practice target, not a scary enemy.
Silhouette must remain readable at 1x and 3x.
Face or eye marks, if used later, must remain simple and non-threatening.
Poof animation is visual-only target spec; no runtime defeat behavior is added here.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime combat, stats, AI, or quest behavior is included.
Practice Slime remains compatible with the current optional learning/combat-bonus loop.
